title: clerodendrum glabrum var. minutiflorum
intro: Clerodendrum glabrum var. minutiflorum, also known as the small-flowered clerodendrum, is a plant species in the Lamiaceae family. The plant is reported to have medicinal properties, with its leaves and stems containing compounds that may exhibit anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. Consuming or applying the plant is said to provide various health benefits, including relief from fever, cough, and skin irritations, as well as aiding in digestion and reducing inflammation. The herbal preparations of Clerodendrum glabrum var. minutiflorum are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, although more research is required to confirm its efficacy and safety.
